reviews.review_description:
Couple days ago complete update was released!!! Old AimXR was fast, clean and playable.
New update ruined performance on Quest.
New UI/matchmaking/server browser feels terrible.
FPS drops, stutters, blurry graphics.
Please bring back classic server browser and lightweight UI. This version update- zero stars!!!

Please revert back to previous version. New update is unplayable. Lag, not able to join, slow, bullets not hitting, (I was very good, now terrible), menus hidden and then awful, not intuitive. The previous version was excellent 5 stars. Now you've really messed up....probably chasing money. Go back to the original version and I would gladly pay for it.

developer_response.body: Hello, please try the recent 0.8.7 update, it fixed a lot of things wrong with the initial new update release. The lag spikes are now fixed, as well as a lot of other critical bugs. Thanks

reviews.review_description: Update ruined game play. They would rather prioritize just more players then a good play experience. One or two people's ping ruining the whole server for everyone. "Lost packages" is the problem. More like you shouldn't have updated it if it didn't work.

developer_response.body: Hello, please try the recent 0.8.7 update, it fixed a lot of things wrong with the initial new update release. The lag spikes are now fixed, as well as a lot of other critical bugs. Thanks

reviews.review_description: I understand its a new update, and there will be a few bugs to work out. But so far my experience has been that the old version was better. With the update there are lags, complete freezes, and several disconnect from servers. Also switching from server to server is not as easy as in the old version. Which with the old version, the only issue I would have would be an occasional hand glitch but that was usually when controller battery would get low, so that was a user issue. Easily fixed. Hopefully the few bugs that are being experienced will be worked out quickly, and game play will be smoother.

Really, good game. BUT, There are no new weapons, the animations of the hands in the game are a disaster , the same type of game all the time (Team deathmatch), there are no additions to the weapons (such as lasers, or other sights). The game is basically abandoned, the reason that he is still alive, it's because of those people who aren't buying games on the quest.

Please change it and do something.

Lot of these larger studios like those who made Larcenuats can’t even make a offline mode for when the servers get cut off.

This developer even added it to their free game .

Those giving it a 1 star for some update they didn’t like are the biggest babies in the VR landscape.

reviews.review_title: Take something awesome and ruin it
reviews.review_description: This game was amazing and I have had so much fun on it. Unfortunately, the updates how it works and now everything kinda works mostly. I wish there was a way to just roll it back to what it was. Hopefully it will get fixed soon but in the meantime it's not enjoyable. None of the guns work like they used to. Laggy spikes and you can shoot a player straight in their face and it doesn't do anything to them.

When I turn on aim, it goes to tutorials and can’t get out of it. What’s going on with that? at first, I was able to get on but had a blank screen. You can hear it but couldn’t play it. Now all it wants to do is go to the gun range.￼

Hey, quick question. Can you add a minigun to the game? It is a shooter game for a reason, and it would be pretty cool to see that added to the game. And also, can you add something in settings to where when you snipe people, it is more still? Not auto-aim, but something that will make the sniper a little bit more still because I'm great at sniping in other games, but this game thinks my hands are too shaky to kill. And finally, 1 more thing, can you add a sandbox mode? I'm not saying you have to add these, this is a great game already, but just some ideas for the game. Thank you!

I love this game. The graphics are the perfect balance of simple yet advanced, The guns are relatively simple to use, and I have not had an experience with any toxic players. I played a game where my whole team was singing random songs just because they could! It is addictive, but I wish there were more updates. It would be really cool to see add-ons to guns, or buy guns with in-game coins you earn from matches. Anyways, great and fun game, just some updates would be nice to have.

Unfortunately the formerly fully free app now started with paid options. :-(
Also friendly fire is allowed, causing people in almost every game to slaughter their own. 
No more fun

developer_response.body: Hello, please try the recent 0.8.7 update, it fixed a lot of things wrong with the initial new update. The lag spikes are now fixed, and friendly fire is disabled. Thanks

reviews.review_description: I’m not a gamer, using VR for entertainment and experience few hours a week. This game is less complex to learn, neat interface and action packed especially in multiplayer mode. I felt tired with games that requires to go through complicated trainings, and too much cognitive effort for loading, pulling trigger, etc.

reviews.review_title: Not the feel I was hoping for
reviews.review_description: I did about 10 minutes for rearranging my stuff because when you first lode in the place where your guns are is buns. After that the animations were terrible and some of the guns didn’t have any recoil so it was overpowered my hands were also stuck in place for some reason. If your looking for a battleground game pls get forefront it’s what was hoping this game would be like but it’s not so don’t get it. I would rather be doing a real life job to save up for forefront than playing this game.

Why out of all the things you could of added, why not based level servers? j would really like to play with people that are around my level. I think others would appreciate this as well as myself. I don't think its too hard to add like c'mon, the game would be A LOT better, even if its just a small thing, pls add this, then I'll change my mind on the rating

The games good in opinion my only complaints are the guns no new guns and the hands mine are just not facing the controllers witch hurt my gameplay also no new guns or at least sights or laser dots and if you would add a map that would need a flashlight I would be ok with that at least sights thou the closest thing is the sniper rifle sights and the iron sights

Hey Devs! I have played this game since I got my vr but I noticed this game looks familiar to counter strike so I was wondering if you could add skin crates to unbox some unique skins like counter strike, and maybe the community could make some skins, and maybe some more guns and gadgets like claymores
The game is brilliant; if they could add a few servers in the Middle East, that would be absolutely brilliant. There are loads of us playing here on the European servers, but the ping is too high.

1st off, can't uninstall. 2nd, Frustration so bad that I need to buy another 600 dollar headset (F that) due to a fortunate throwing of it into my coffee table smashing it to bits. This game was the first and last game I ever try on a VR by Meta. PoC.
In every other game my arm tracking is fine except for this game like why cant it fully track my controlers
Spent hours playing this game,now since the update i cant even access the games,it keeps taking me to the gun range which i am not interested in and i cannot find any way of uninstalling the update

This is a really great game. I’ve truly been enjoying it. The spawn rate is great. The guns are cool. I still haven’t figured out how you can reload a second gun when you have two guns in your hand. So I wonder what’s the point of two guns. Just for fun? Here’s my real complaint though. My wife and I love playing together. She usually hosts the game and everything. My biggest complaint is every time the game ends. It restarts for her automatically. But I’m left staring at the kill screen and waiting for host. So I have to completely exit out of the game. Restart it from the beginning and then rejoin her. It takes like a minute of my playing time. It happens every single time we play. If there’s an answer for this please let me know. It’s really aggravating having to start so over just to get back into the arena with my ride. Thank you !!!
this game is bad Cruz updated was bad and it takes to much GBs and it sucks

Fortnite box pvp matches in vr
But you just need to add some more weapons like snipers and miniguns and maybe abit more realism without lagginess

reviews.review_title: I don't even know what this is
reviews.review_description: One day I joined the game but my arms were inverted backwards. I was so mad I literally almost crashed out. So I deleted it and re-downloaded it. AND IT STILL DIDN'T WORK. I wanted to do warcrimes after that. Luckily bonelab mods and downshot exist. 1 star
No game that is free is better than this one when it comes to a shooter game
Best game  ever since Pavlov just needs more maps i give it 4/Stars umm😁i changed my mind 5 stars we updating now 🤣
I was being verbally attacked by some kid and I defended myself.  The moderator acted like a complete jerk and silenced me. My last time playing AIMXR.  And I sold my $150,000 of Meta stock.
Although I've played this game for ages it now keeps starting me at the firing range
How can I get multiplayer whit a new ubdate
Used to love this app but the update is rubbish. Launches me straight into the target practice area and that's it. Nothing else. Zero stars

developer_response.body: Hello, you can press the menu button on your controller to see a list of servers to join. Please try that. Thanks

reviews.review_description: It was very cool graphics
The new update ruined everything. This was my favorite game and I have deleted it. The new update is really horrible

reviews.review_description: the games good, don’t quit cuz the update it’ll fix eventually, there’s a lot of kids just ignore em and have fun

This game makes me laugh way too often. The body flinging physics are super funny. 10 out of 10

Great game! Only improvements would be NEW maps and more players. Love it, please keep it going!

I know it's a shooting game but I think you should add knives. You could even make it where you can throw the knives too. They would allow people to take out enemies with stealth and it would be cool to see two people fighting with knives

reviews.review_description: The game is a great shooter and reminds me of call of duty , there’s multiple maps and guns but it can be very sweaty and there are some people who abuse the voice chat but other than that it’s a great game and i recommend it
Love this game

reviews.review_description: Hi I just downloaded the game it is perfect there are no cursing kids but I feel like it is too hard to aim can u fix that

This game is one of if not the best multiplayer first person shooter on the market let alone its free price tag, but it needs constant updates or needs to be updated more often. Everything is amazing no complaints there but new guns or maps or game modes wouldn’t hurt been playing for ahile just hope to see the best for the game’s future

reviews.review_title: Favorite Vr game of all time.
reviews.review_description: Seriously so fun been playing for months now regularly and somehow still not sick of it, super fun game 5/5 stars zero complaints.

This game is one of those free games that doesn’t let you down in the fun department like sooooooooo many others 😞 but this game has a mostly good community and a fun call of duty like feel but for this to have been one of the 50 best games of the year the devs need to add a update now maybe more weapons or another map or skins

reviews.review_title: How to leave in this game???
reviews.review_description: Umm could u please like add a exit whole game button?cuz im really confused from where to leave!i might be playing this my whole life and still not know how to leave,like please tell me how to leave the entire game?like this is a great game already! But many players including me dont know how to exit the entire game.Please tell me how to exit as soon as possible!.
It’s fun to play, I  feel like a soldier
This game is real fun but when I get shot in the arm once I die immediately?

Very good game to play with friend but there isnt much updates and the guns are good but  more options would be good and it’s hard to aim when you have shakey hands so I think adding like physics to the sniper to put it on the walls would be nice overall 10/10

I have played every FPS for the quest platform and this is the first time I have enjoyed every minute of it.  For such a limited game right now it offers a lot of fun.  

Developers: Please add the ability to hold a weapon without having to keep the grip button held down, maybe a toggle system?
Game is good but laggy

reviews.review_description: Add melee that's all I'm asking otherwise this game is great and I plan to make many videos on it
Awesome entertainment. Lots of players. Great experience overall.
More weapons would be better maybe even vehicle or like a mode where it's a huge battle and if you die you don't respawn or like missions
So guys, I played this once then went to 0lay again and it doesn't load up, any idea if it's me or your side of things?
It was a good game until my hands started to act weird and it was impossible to play

I recently just downloaded this game because I got a quest for the first time. Now the weapons I don’t mind, they’re pretty cool. But most servers I join are doing lame game modes like shotguns only, which maybe that’s just me. But the main problem with this game is the lag and the  kids. Every server I join has some annoying little kids talking about overused lame jokes like Epstein or Charlie Kirk, or other unfunny jokes in general. They also don’t shut up like, ever. You do have some dudes that are grown and chill tho which is what I like. But the only real problem is the annoying kids, people glitching in walls, and the toxicity. This game is a hit or miss, you’ll get good servers with chill dudes, or little annoying kids.
This game is one of the best shooters in the world

the game is full of  tryhards,the guns are unbalanced and the updates dont even come out so ur just stuck with silenced m4 and the ak beacuse they are the best guns rn (id recomend adding more guns like scar or g36 more maps too)

Excellent game, the most fun I’ve had in any VR shooter. The only thing I would really like to see in the game is the ability to call in Scorestreaks and being able to customize the weapons. 

There are some games I’ve gone on 15-20 kill streaks without being killed, and you don’t even get so much as a banner indicating that you are on a kill streak. I’d love to see attack helicopters, K-9 units, UAVs, etc in the game. 

The other thing is customization. Some guns are completely unusable without a red dot sight. The Famas would be fun to use, but its iron sight is awful. Please update this so we can have more variety! Thanks.
This game is fun and all but it is kinda like a rip off of vail but it is still really fun
It needs better graphics and more teams and wtv
the best shooting game out there. the fact that it's a free game it makes it even better.
This game has people using the N-Word like it’s nothing, and at times is very offensive! Once we start calling Caucasian’s out of there name, it may become a hate game!

reviews.review_title: Simple and fun, all you need
reviews.review_description: Its mean fun, fast gameplay. Make sure to turn virtual stock on, makes aiming way easier
When I first started playing on the quest 3s this was the game I downloaded It's so much fun to actually play this I recomend

reviews.review_title: this game is ruined and trash remake it
reviews.review_description: there is a hack for the mac 10 and you can head tap everyone from the other side of the map by just pressing the trigger, there has been multiple people that i know to report these kids. it used to be fun but the owner of aim doesn’t keep up with the game and lets the hackers keep their account. no matter what game you get into it’s atleast 3 hackers and they will stay killing everyone happily.. not just the max 10 the sniper is very broken too, one person can camp a spawn the whole game and get all the kills for that team and make the other team loose 170-20. this game is trash it needs a remake
But it is a little laggy

Not the best game but it’s a really fun game all-time favorite is UGG but this is one of my favorites. It’s a really good game, but I do think you should add some more things. Like new guns I’ve been playing this game for about two weeks now no about three days but I do think it’s a fun game. I’ve haven’t heard there was been an update for a while so maybe that can happen. It’s a really good game not the best but good.

Bro I love playing this game and I think it's awesome but there are some things that I think the developers of the game need to add first off of course the revolver second a knife. Third different types of shotguns.fouth minigun other than that it's absolutely one of the best free games in VR

I love this game,simple and nostalgic.The graphics  maps ,the game mechanics are very nice. Really hope we can choose our own load out before starting any game not just given gun randomly.Other than that,i think this is the best free shooting game available here.
